src.parsers.sampleArea package

Submodules

src.parsers.sampleArea.geojson module

geojson.py

Defines the Geojson, which reads a GeoJSON file and parses it into a SampleArea.

class src.parsers.sampleArea.geojson.Geojson[source]

Bases: Parser[SampleArea]

Parse sample area bounds from a GeoJSON file.

Reads a QuPath exported GeoJSON file and extracts the sample area bounds into a SampleArea instance.

parse(filepath)[source]

Read and parse the sample area from a GeoJSON file.

Reads the file at filepath and delegates it to parse_sample_area() to extract the sample area bounds.

Parameters:

filepath (str) – The path to the GeoJSON file.

Returns:

The parsed sample area.

Return type:

SampleArea

parse_sample_area(json_data)[source]

Extract the sample area data from parsed GeoJSON data.

Parameters:

json_data (list[Any]) – The raw GeoJSON data to extract the sample area from.

Returns:

The extracted sample area.

Return type:

SampleArea

Module contents

class src.parsers.sampleArea.Geojson[source]

Bases: Parser[SampleArea]

Parse sample area bounds from a GeoJSON file.

Reads a QuPath exported GeoJSON file and extracts the sample area bounds into a SampleArea instance.

parse(filepath)[source]

Read and parse the sample area from a GeoJSON file.

Reads the file at filepath and delegates it to parse_sample_area() to extract the sample area bounds.

Parameters:

filepath (str) – The path to the GeoJSON file.

Returns:

The parsed sample area.

Return type:

SampleArea

parse_sample_area(json_data)[source]

Extract the sample area data from parsed GeoJSON data.

Parameters:

json_data (list[Any]) – The raw GeoJSON data to extract the sample area from.

SampleArea
